requirement_topic.en: EV Connector and Plug Standard — IEC 62196 Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC
requirement_topic.zh: 电动汽车连接器与插头标准——IEC 62196 Type 2交流及CCS2直流
requirement_topic.zht: 電動汽車連接器與插頭標準——IEC 62196 Type 2交流及CCS2直流

summary.en: New Zealand's EV charging direction aligns with IEC 62196 connector families used in Australia and Europe: Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC fast charging. Product variants intended for New Zealand should use IEC 62196-compatible couplers, vehicle connectors, socket-outlets, control pilot / proximity functions, and documentation. CHAdeMO remains present in legacy imported-vehicle infrastructure, but new China-export charger planning should not assume that China GB/T connectors are acceptable.
summary.zh: 新西兰电动汽车充电方向与澳大利亚及欧洲使用的IEC 62196接口族保持一致：交流充电采用Type 2，直流快充采用CCS2。面向新西兰的产品型号应采用兼容IEC 62196的耦合器、车辆连接器、插座、控制导引 / 接近检测功能及文件。CHAdeMO在旧有进口车辆基础设施中仍然存在，但中国出口充电桩规划不应假设中国GB/T接口可被接受。
summary.zht: 紐西蘭電動汽車充電方向與澳大利亞及歐洲使用的IEC 62196接口族保持一致：交流充電採用Type 2，直流快充採用CCS2。面向紐西蘭的產品型號應採用相容IEC 62196的耦合器、車輛連接器、插座、控制導引 / 接近檢測功能及文件。CHAdeMO在舊有進口車輛基礎設施中仍然存在，但中國出口充電樁規劃不應假設中國GB/T接口可被接受。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — Configuration FF / CCS2 DC vehicle couplers
AS/NZS IEC 61851 series — EV conductive charging system

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234 connector hardware for domestic AC and DC charging, with GB/T 18487.1-2023 conductive charging requirements and GB/T 27930 communications for DC charging. GB/T 20234 AC and DC couplers are physically different from IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2 arrangements and should be treated as incompatible hardware for New Zealand.
summary.zh: 中国国内交流及直流充电使用GB/T 20234接口硬件，并配套GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电要求及直流充电GB/T 27930通信。GB/T 20234交流和直流耦合器与IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2结构在物理上不同，应视为不适用于新西兰的硬件。
summary.zht: 中國國內交流及直流充電使用GB/T 20234接口硬體，並配套GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電要求及直流充電GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T 20234交流和直流耦合器與IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2結構在物理上不同，應視為不適用於紐西蘭的硬體。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.1-2023 — General requirements for EV conductive charging connection set
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system
GB/T 27930 — DC charger and battery management system communication

gap.en: Major hardware gap: a China-market GB/T connector charger is not plug-compatible with New Zealand Type 2 AC or CCS2 DC infrastructure. Exporters must redesign the cable, coupler, inlet, locking, pilot/proximity signalling, labels, enclosure openings, and DC communication stack for the New Zealand product variant. This is a hardware and firmware change, not a documentation-only change.
gap.zh: 重大硬件差距：中国市场GB/T接口充电桩与新西兰Type 2交流或CCS2直流基础设施不具插接兼容性。出口商须针对新西兰型号重新设计电缆、耦合器、插口、锁止、控制导引/接近检测信号、标签、外壳开孔及直流通信协议栈。这是硬件和固件变更，不是单纯文件变更。
gap.zht: 重大硬體差距：中國市場GB/T接口充電樁與紐西蘭Type 2交流或CCS2直流基礎設施不具插接相容性。出口商須針對紐西蘭型號重新設計電纜、耦合器、插口、鎖止、控制導引/接近檢測訊號、標籤、外殼開孔及直流通訊協議棧。這是硬體和固件變更，不是單純文件變更。

mandatory_status.target: Market direction / project requirement — Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC are the New Zealand interoperability direction for new charger deployments; exact procurement requirements should be confirmed for the site
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic charging equipment — GB/T 20234 connector system and GB/T 27930 DC communication

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] New Zealand-facing EV chargers should be specified around IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC. China GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with this direction, and GB/T 27930 DC communication is not a CCS2 communication substitute. Hardware and firmware redesign is normally required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向新西兰的电动汽车充电桩应按IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流方向配置。中国GB/T 20234接口与该方向物理不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通信也不能替代CCS2通信，通常需要硬件和固件重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向紐西蘭的電動汽車充電樁應按IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流方向配置。中國GB/T 20234接口與該方向物理不相容，GB/T 27930直流通訊也不能替代CCS2通訊，通常需要硬體和固件重新設計。
